sentence: 十九世纪，英法两国在海外争夺殖民地。
pinyin: Shí jiǔ shì jì, Yīng Fǎ liǎng guó zài hǎi wài zhēng duó zhí mín dì.
english: In the nineteenth century, Britain and France competed for colonies overseas.

sentence: 别闹事，出了乱子谁都担不起责任。
pinyin: Bié nào shì, chū le luàn zi shuí dōu dān bù qǐ zé rèn.
english: Don't cause trouble — if something goes wrong, nobody can take responsibility.

meaning: New style, latest fashion, new model
sentence: 这家店刚到了几部新款手机。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn gāng dào le jǐ bù xīnkuǎn shǒujī.
english: This store just received several new-model smartphones.

sentence: 打印机没墨了，得去买墨盒。
pinyin: Dǎyìnjī méi mò le, děi qù mǎi mòhé.
english: The printer is out of ink; I need to go buy a new cartridge.

meaning: 1. deep emotion; 2. deep feeling; 3. deep love
sentence: 她深情地望着窗外的风景。
pinyin: Tā shēnqíng de wàng zhe chuāng wài de fēngjǐng.
english: She gazed affectionately at the scenery outside the window.
